name: Yellow-Bellied Oni
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>血</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When you Xyz Summon a monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster you control, then target 1 face-up Xyz Monster on the field; reduce its Rank by 1, and if you do, it loses 300 ATK.
mnst_eff: When you Xyz Summon a monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster you control, then target 1 face-up Xyz Monster on the field; reduce its Rank by 1, and if you do, it loses 300 ATK.
eff: When you Xyz Summon a monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster you control, then target 1 face-up Xyz Monster on the field; reduce its Rank by 1, and if you do, it loses 300 ATK.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
